description.value: Aura moderate transmutation; CL 8th; Slot none; Price 20,000 gp; Weight 5 lbs. DESCRIPTION Someone who carries this blue-and-white staff need never feel small nor weak, as the staff brings everybody and everything down to size. This staff allows the use of the following spells: Reduce person (1 charge) Reduce animal (2 charges) Shrink item (2 charges) Mass reduce person (4 charges) CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Staff; Spells mass reduce person, reduce animal, reduce person, shrink item; Cost 10,000 gp.
